details: Forecast 2025.4 to 2029.4 using the stock FM input deck.
runs.label: Stock FAIR Model 2/2026
runs.summary: Untouched stock FAIR model reference run.

details: JGSWITCH=0, JGPHASE=0, JGHILO=0.
PSE accounting, imports, and JG identities remain unchanged.
This is a PSE hybrid run, not the pure stock FAIR model.
Only the PF equation block is swapped to the stock FM form.
runs.label: PSE2026.2 Base (PSE + Stock PF Eq.)
runs.summary: PSE base using the stock FM PF equation and LCUSTZ term.

details: Exact 10-year extension of the PSE-with-stock-PF base variant.
The first 2025.4 to 2029.4 path should match the 5-year PSE-with-stock-PF base run.
runs.label: PSE2026.2 Base (PSE + Stock PF Eq.)
runs.summary: PSE base using the stock FM PF equation and LCUSTZ term.

details: JGSWITCH=1, JGHILO=1, and UBGH=0.5.
JGPHASE keeps the standard 5-step ramp.
JGW starts at 0.020 and JGCOLA applies 3% annualized growth from 2026.1 onward.
This is a PSE hybrid run, not the pure stock FAIR model.
Only the PF equation block is swapped to the stock FM form.
runs.label: PSE2026.2 High $20/h 3% (PSE + Stock PF Eq.)
runs.summary: High take-up with a $20/hour start and 3% annual wage growth, using the stock PF equation inside the PSE deck.

details: Exact 10-year extension of the PSE-with-stock-PF high $20/hour 3% variant.
The first 2025.4 to 2029.4 path should match the 5-year PSE-with-stock-PF run.

details: JGSWITCH=0, JGPHASE=0, and JGHILO=0 so the JG employment block stays off.
JGWPHASE carries the standard 5-step ramp used by the JG scenarios.
JGW starts at 0.020, JGCOLA applies 3% annualized growth, and MWCOLA keeps MINWAGE on the same quarterly path.
JG wage feedback stays active through JGWFADJ without turning on JG jobs, JG income, or JG spending.
runs.label: PSE2026.2 $20/h 3% Wage-Only (PSE + Stock PF Eq.)
runs.summary: Wage-only counterfactual in the PSE deck with a $20/hour start and 3% annual wage growth, using the stock PF equation.

details: Exact 10-year extension of the PSE-with-stock-PF $20/hour wage-only counterfactual.
The first 2025.4 to 2029.4 path should match the 5-year wage-only run.
runs.label: PSE2026.2 $20/h 3% Wage-Only (PSE + Stock PF Eq.)
runs.summary: Wage-only counterfactual in the PSE deck with a $20/hour start and 3% annual wage growth, using the stock PF equation.

details: JGSWITCH=0, JGPHASE=0, and JGHILO=0 so the JG employment block stays off.
JGWPHASE carries the standard 5-step ramp used by the JG scenarios.
JGW starts at 0.015, JGCOLA applies 3% annualized growth, and MWCOLA keeps MINWAGE on the same quarterly path.
JG wage feedback stays active through JGWFADJ without turning on JG jobs, JG income, or JG spending.

runs.summary: Wage-only counterfactual in the PSE deck with a $15/hour start and 3% annual wage growth, using the stock PF equation.

details: Keeps the full JG high-take-up $20/hour 3% setup.
Forces RS quarter by quarter to the corresponding $20/hour wage-only run.
Leaves JG employment, spending, and wage channels otherwise active.
runs.label: PSE2026.2 High $20/h 3% (RS from Wage-Only)
runs.summary: High take-up $20/hour JG run with the T-bill path replaced by the matching wage-only counterfactual.

details: Exact 10-year extension of the high $20/hour RS-exogenous counterfactual.
RS matches the corresponding $20/hour wage-only run through 2034.4.
runs.label: PSE2026.2 High $20/h 3% (RS from Wage-Only)
